cd /tmp/sv-16d7eca7411d4b119ba4401bd95c01b5 && python3 -c "
import json

# The .ips file has a JSON header line, then a JSON body
with open('ios_crash.ips') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

# First line is header JSON, rest is body JSON
body = json.loads(''.join(lines[1:]))

# Build image index
images = body['usedImages']

# Find all unsymbolicated frames across all threads and lastExceptionBacktrace
def find_unsymbolicated(frames, label):
    results = []
    for i, frame in enumerate(frames):
        if 'symbol' not in frame:
            img = images[frame['imageIndex']]
            results.append({
                'label': label,
                'frame_idx': i,
                'imageIndex': frame['imageIndex'],
                'imageOffset': frame['imageOffset'],
                'image_name': img.get('name', '??'),
                'image_base': img['base'],
                'image_uuid': img.get('uuid', '??'),
                'image_path': img.get('path', '??'),
                'load_addr_hex': hex(img['base']),
                'frame_addr_hex': hex(img['base'] + frame['imageOffset']),
            })
    return results

all_unsym = []

# lastExceptionBacktrace
if 'lastExceptionBacktrace' in body:
    all_unsym.extend(find_unsymbolicated(body['lastExceptionBacktrace'], 'lastExceptionBacktrace'))

# All threads
for tidx, thread in enumerate(body['threads']):
    label = f'Thread {tidx}' + (' (crashed)' if thread.get('triggered') else '')
    all_unsym.extend(find_unsymbolicated(thread['frames'], label))

# Print summary
print(f'Found {len(all_unsym)} unsymbolicated frames total\n')

# Group by image
from collections import defaultdict
by_image = defaultdict(list)
for f in all_unsym:
    by_image[f['image_name']].append(f)

for img_name, frames in by_image.items():
    img = frames[0]
    print(f'=== {img_name} ===')
    print(f'  UUID: {img[\"image_uuid\"]}')
    print(f'  Path: {img[\"image_path\"]}')
    print(f'  Load address: {img[\"load_addr_hex\"]}')
    print()
    for f in frames:
        print(f'  [{f[\"label\"]}] frame {f[\"frame_idx\"]}: offset {f[\"imageOffset\"]} -> addr {f[\"frame_addr_hex\"]}')
    print()
"

import json
from collections import defaultdict

with open('ios_crash.ips') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()
body = json.loads(''.join(lines[1:]))
images = body['usedImages']

# Focus on app-bundled images with unsymbolicated frames
# imageIndex 1 = SampleMAUI.framework (AOT-compiled managed code)
# imageIndex 7 = libcoreclr (CoreCLR runtime)

target_images = {
    1: images[1],  # SampleMAUI.framework
    7: images[7],  # libcoreclr
}

# Collect unique offsets per image
def collect_unsym(frames):
    per_image = defaultdict(set)
    for f in frames:
        if 'symbol' not in f and f['imageIndex'] in target_images:
            img = target_images[f['imageIndex']]
            addr = hex(img['base'] + f['imageOffset'])
            per_image[f['imageIndex']].add(addr)
    return per_image

all_addrs = defaultdict(set)
if 'lastExceptionBacktrace' in body:
    for k, v in collect_unsym(body['lastExceptionBacktrace']).items():
        all_addrs[k] |= v
for t in body['threads']:
    for k, v in collect_unsym(t['frames']).items():
        all_addrs[k] |= v

# Print info
for idx, img in target_images.items():
    addrs = sorted(all_addrs.get(idx, set()))
    print(f'Image: {img[\"name\"]}')
    print(f'  Path (on device): {img[\"path\"]}')
    print(f'  UUID: {img[\"uuid\"]}')
    print(f'  Load address: {hex(img[\"base\"])}')
    print(f'  Architecture: {img[\"arch\"]}')
    print(f'  Unsymbolicated addresses: {len(addrs)}')
    print()

    # dSYM location hint
    dsym_name = img['name']
    print(f'  # Locate the dSYM with:')
    print(f'  mdfind \"com_apple_xcode_dsym_uuids == {img[\"uuid\"].upper()}\"')
    print(f'  # Or look in your Xcode archive:')
    print(f'  #   ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/Archives/<date>/<archive>.xcarchive/dSYMs/{dsym_name}.framework.dSYM')
    print()

    # atos command  
    addr_list = ' '.join(addrs)
    print(f'  # atos command:')
    print(f'  atos -arch {img[\"arch\"]} -o {dsym_name}.framework.dSYM/Contents/Resources/DWARF/{dsym_name} -l {hex(img[\"base\"])} {addr_list}')
    print()
    # Also show individual lines for clarity
    print(f'  # Or one address at a time:')
    for a in addrs:
        print(f'  atos -arch {img[\"arch\"]} -o {dsym_name}.framework.dSYM/Contents/Resources/DWARF/{dsym_name} -l {hex(img[\"base\"])} {a}')
    print()
    print('---')
    print()
"

from collections import defaultdict

with open('ios_crash.ips') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()
body = json.loads(''.join(lines[1:]))
images = body['usedImages']

# Focus on app-bundled images with unsymbolicated frames
# imageIndex 1 = SampleMAUI.framework (AOT-compiled managed code)
# imageIndex 7 = libcoreclr (CoreCLR runtime)

target_images = {
    1: images[1],  # SampleMAUI.framework
    7: images[7],  # libcoreclr
}

# Collect unique offsets per image
def collect_unsym(frames):
    per_image = defaultdict(set)
    for f in frames:
        if 'symbol' not in f and f['imageIndex'] in target_images:
            img = target_images[f['imageIndex']]
            addr = hex(img['base'] + f['imageOffset'])
            per_image[f['imageIndex']].add(addr)
    return per_image

all_addrs = defaultdict(set)
if 'lastExceptionBacktrace' in body:
    for k, v in collect_unsym(body['lastExceptionBacktrace']).items():
        all_addrs[k] |= v
for t in body['threads']:
    for k, v in collect_unsym(t['frames']).items():
        all_addrs[k] |= v

# Print info
for idx, img in target_images.items():
    addrs = sorted(all_addrs.get(idx, set()))
    print(f'Image: {img[\"name\"]}')
    print(f'  Path (on device): {img[\"path\"]}')
    print(f'  UUID: {img[\"uuid\"]}')
    print(f'  Load address: {hex(img[\"base\"])}')
    print(f'  Architecture: {img[\"arch\"]}')
    print(f'  Unsymbolicated addresses: {len(addrs)}')
    print()

    # dSYM location hint
    dsym_name = img['name']
    print(f'  # Locate the dSYM with:')
    print(f'  mdfind \"com_apple_xcode_dsym_uuids == {img[\"uuid\"].upper()}\"')
    print(f'  # Or look in your Xcode archive:')
    print(f'  #   ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/Archives/<date>/<archive>.xcarchive/dSYMs/{dsym_name}.framework.dSYM')
    print()

    # atos command  
    addr_list = ' '.join(addrs)
    print(f'  # atos command:')
    print(f'  atos -arch {img[\"arch\"]} -o {dsym_name}.framework.dSYM/Contents/Resources/DWARF/{dsym_name} -l {hex(img[\"base\"])} {addr_list}')
    print()
    # Also show individual lines for clarity
    print(f'  # Or one address at a time:')
    for a in addrs:
        print(f'  atos -arch {img[\"arch\"]} -o {dsym_name}.framework.dSYM/Contents/Resources/DWARF/{dsym_name} -l {hex(img[\"base\"])} {a}')
    print()
    print('---')
    print()
"
